failures.description: The agent incorrectly answered "No" even though the ProductCatalogSearch result showed the item's deck material was plastic.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 2177997696 has deck material=plastic. The tool output at index 3 clearly returned one matching item whose options include "deck material": "plastic". At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts the relevant tool output. This is not an invalid tool invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the required evidence was available and was misread or ignored.
